overall.description: A first-person drive through a futuristic cyberpunk city highway in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves along an elevated roadway past large holographic billboards, under concrete overpasses, and alongside modern construction sites, with warm afternoon sunlight casting long shadows across the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with large advertisement billboard

events.description: large billboard initially fills the frame then moves left out of view
moving from static billboard view to open highway driving perspective

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the elevated highway, passing a large holographic advertisement billboard

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: large advertisement for Squirtadvisor 2069 featuring a pink water gun and woman with purple hair
rusted metal barrier with yellow and black diagonal warning stripes
elevated concrete highway structure crossing ahead

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a close-up of a vibrant holographic billboard advertising Squirtadvisor 2069. The camera then moves forward along an elevated highway, revealing the open road ahead with a metal guardrail on the right and a black sedan passing by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane elevated highway with distant cityscape

events.description: white van passes by in the left lane
slight left curve as highway bends toward the overpass

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed along the elevated highway, approaching the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: white van traveling in the left lane
several cars visible ahead on the highway

entered.detail: tall building under construction with green scaffolding and exposed framework
twin advertisement banners hanging from the overpass structure ahead

segments.scene_description: Driving along the open elevated highway with clear blue skies above. The road curves gently left toward a large overpass structure ahead, with a construction site visible on the left and multiple vehicles sharing the road. Twin billboards hang from the approaching overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with concrete walls and overhead structure

events.description: entering the shadow of the overpass, sunlight significantly reduced
large wall billboard becomes visible on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving under the concrete overpass, moving through the shaded corridor alongside a retaining wall

notable_agents.action: distant car visible ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: smooth concrete wall running along the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a shaded corridor under the concrete overpass structure. The bright sunlight gives way to mixed lighting as the camera drives alongside a smooth concrete retaining wall on the right, with the construction site building now more prominent on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway emerging from underpass with wall advertisements

events.description: large Follow Your Instincts billboard fills the right side of the frame
exiting the overpass shadow back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: passing the large wall billboard and continuing along the highway as it opens up to the construction site area

entered.detail: large yellow billboard featuring a red muscular figure with text FOLLOW YOUR INSTINCTS

segments.scene_description: The camera passes a massive yellow billboard reading FOLLOW YOUR INSTINCTS on the right wall, then emerges back into direct sunlight. The highway continues toward a large construction site with green scaffolding now prominent on the left side as the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along an elevated futuristic highway that transitions from open, sunlit vistas into a shaded urban corridor before emerging back into the bright afternoon light. It begins with a close-up of a vibrant Squirtadvisor 2069 holographic billboard before moving forward past a black sedan and along a metal guardrail under clear blue skies. As the road curves gently left, the scene opens up to reveal a construction site and twin billboards hanging from a looming overpass. The camera then glides into the shaded depths of the concrete overpass, where the bright sunlight shifts to mixed lighting against a smooth retaining wall. Finally, the view passes a massive yellow billboard reading FOLLOW YOUR INSTINCTS and emerges back into direct sunlight, heading toward a large construction site with prominent green scaffolding.
